chunks.text: # example smb.conf for connecting to EECS resources [global] log file = /var/log/samba/%m.log max log size = 0 security = user socket options = TCP_NODELAY SO_RCVBUF=8192 SO_SNDBUF=8192 wins server = 169.229.60.182 workgroup = EE
wins server = 169.229.60.182 workgroup = EECS client ntlmv2 auth = yes
